meaning: vbl.steal的过去式n.女用披肩,圣衣,长巾
examples: She stole a glance at her watch.
They stole the car just for the hell of it.
This is proof positive that he stole the money.
My sister and I stole furtive glances at each other, not sure how to answer.
Clearly, he was thrilled for his teammate even if Navarro stole the spotlight from him.
